top_signals.title: Fed Proposes Changes to Anti-Money Laundering Rules for Banks
top_signals.summary: The Federal Reserve proposed changes to anti-money laundering requirements for banks, the latest step by US regulators looking to zero in on what they see as core financial risks.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Monaco bombing suspect shot dead in Kyiv
top_signals.summary: Ukrainian authorities say intelligence officer confessed to paying and killing Anastasia Berezovska
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Saudis Make Biggest Oil Price Cut in Decades as Market Weakens - Bloomberg.com
top_signals.summary: Saudis Make Biggest Oil Price Cut in Decades as Market Weakens  Bloomberg.com
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: Fincantieri to Build Third Hospitality Vessel for Marc-Henry Cruise
top_signals.summary: Fincantieri announced that it has signed a contract with Marc-Henry Cruise Holdings LTD, Joint Owner/Operator of Four Seasons Yachts, for the construction of a third hospitality vessel. The value of this agreement, subject to financing and other typical terms and conditions…
